## Low-Level Design — Complete

**Requirement:** The Solution Architecture design is complete. All the architecture documents are available in the `DevAI360_output/openspec/specs/` directory of the `Cyan-co/shopfloor-app-for-g-accomazzi` repository. Please proceed with the implementation phase. You can start by generating the tasks for the release.

### Generated Files

[x] Step 01: Data Model  → changes/01-data-model/proposal.md + tasks.md
[x] Step 02: Backend API → changes/02-backend-api/proposal.md + tasks.md
[x] Step 03: Frontend UI → changes/03-frontend-ui/proposal.md + tasks.md

### Summary

Based on the provided architecture documents, I have generated a detailed low-level design for the Shop Floor Material Supply System. This includes:
- A complete data model with entities for Users, Parts, and Orders.
- A backend API design with services, business rules, and endpoints.
- A frontend UI design with views, components, and user interactions for each role.
Implementation tasks for each layer have also been created.
